channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Liam Gallagher Responds to Oasis’ Rock and Roll Hall of Fame Induction: ‘A Real Honor’
item.description: 🎸 Liam Gallagher shares his excitement over Oasis' Hall of Fame induction! Rock on, legends! 🤘 #Oasis #RockHall 🌟

item.title: Rock Hall Inductees: Oasis, Sade, Wu-Tang, Luther
item.description: 🎸🌟 Rock legends unite! Oasis, Sade, Wu-Tang Clan, and Luther Vandross set to join the prestigious Rock Hall! 🎤✨ #MusicIcons #RockAndRollHallOfFame

item.title: Jack Harlow’s Aunt Thought It Was Really Him in Impeccable ‘SNL’ Skit
item.description: When your fam mistakes you for a celeb 😂🙌 Jack Harlow's aunt's got jokes! #SNL #celebritylookalike

item.title: Laufey Throws Pool Party With Alysa Liu, Hudson Williams in ‘Madwoman’ Video
item.description: Dive into the summer groove with Laufey's pool party in the 'Madwoman' video! 🌊💃 #NewMusicVideo #PoolPartyVibes

item.title: The Strokes Announce 2026 Tour Dates With Thundercat, Hamilton Leithauser, & More
item.description: 🎉 The Strokes bringing the ultimate squad for 2026 tour! 🎸 Who's joining the party? #livemusic #TheStrokes #2026Tour

item.title: Britney Spears Voluntarily Checks Into Rehab Facility
item.description: Sending love and strength to Britney Spears as she takes care of herself ❤️ Let's support each other through tough times, just like our favorite artists do! 🎶 #mentalhealthmatters

item.title: Britney Spears Is in Rehab: Report
item.description: Sending love and good vibes to Britney Spears 💕 Wishing her strength and healing during this time 🌟 #FreeBritney #SupportBritney

item.title: Anitta Makes SNL Debut, Ben Marshall Parodies Jack Harlow
item.description: 🚀 Anitta lights up SNL stage, Ben Marshall's Jack Harlow parody is pure gold! 🔥 #MusicNews #SNLDebut #ParodyPerfection 🎶

item.title: The Strokes Fulfill “Lifelong Dream of Opening for Justin Bieber” During Coachella Return
item.description: The Strokes living the dream opening for Justin Bieber at Coachella! 🎸🎤 #RockMeetsPop #CoachellaMagic

item.title: Billy Corgan Makes Surprise Coachella Debut With Sombr
item.description: 🎸 Billy Corgan rocks Coachella with surprise Sombr debut! 🌟 Who else is living for this iconic moment? 🤘 #MusicNews #Sombr #CoachellaVibes

item.title: Watch Justin Bieber Headline Coachella 2026
item.description: 🌟 Bieber fever hits Coachella 2026! 🎤 Get ready to dance with @JustinBieber under the desert sun! ☀️ #Coachella2026 #JustinBieber

item.title: ‘SNL’: Watch Anitta Perform ‘Choka Choka,’ ‘Várias Quejas’
item.description: 🎤 Anitta brought the heat on #SNL with 'Choka Choka' and 'Várias Quejas'! 🔥 Who else was dancing along? 💃 #Anitta #MusicNews

item.title: Sombr Rocks Coachella in Lace and Leather With Help From Billy Corgan
item.description: 🔥 Sombr brings the heat at Coachella, serving lace and leather vibes with a sprinkle of Billy Corgan magic! 🎸 #CoachellaFashion #RockOn

item.title: Addison Rae Gets Coachella Screaming With Thrilling Set
item.description: 🎤🌟 Addison Rae brings the heat at Coachella! 🔥 Who else is dancing along? 💃 #Coachella2022 #AddisonRae #MusicMagic

item.title: Jack White Tears Through a Hit-Laden Last-Minute Set at Coachella
item.description: 🎸 Jack White rocked Coachella with a surprise set full of hits! Who else wishes they were there? 🔥 #Coachella #JackWhite

item.title: Katseye Promise There Will Be ‘Many More Coachella’ Appearances During Fest Debut
item.description: 🌟🎶 Katseye bringing the Coachella vibes! Who's ready for more festival magic? 🌴✨ #Katseye #Coachella #MusicMagic

item.title: Morgan Wallen’s U.S. Bank Stadium Setlist: Every Song From Opening Night of His Still The Problem Tour in Minneapolis
item.description: 🎶🔥 Rocking out with Morgan Wallen at U.S. Bank Stadium! Check out his electric setlist from the Still The Problem Tour in Minneapolis! #MorganWallen #SetlistGoals 🤠

item.title: Ninajirachi and Porter Robinson Debut New Song at Coachella
item.description: 🌟 New bop alert! 🎶 @ninajirachi and @porterrobinson dropped a fresh tune at Coachella! 🔥 Who else is vibing to this collab? #MusicNews

item.title: Bini Become First Filipino Group to Perform at Coachella 2026
item.description: 🌟🇵🇭 Making history! Bini is set to light up Coachella 2026 as the first Filipino group to take the stage! 🎤🔥 #BiniAtCoachella

item.title: Zac Brown Wakes Artemis II Crew in Space With Song ‘Free’
item.description: 🚀🎶 Sending good vibes to space! Zac Brown wakes up Artemis II crew with a special serenade of 'Free'! #SpaceJams #ZacBrownBand #MusicInSpace ✨

item.title: Tasha – “Summer”
item.description: 🌞☀️ Let Tasha's new track "Summer" be the anthem to your sunny days! 🎶🎵 #NewMusicAlert #FeelGoodVibes

item.title: Welcome to Rockville announces 2026 set times
item.description: 🎸 Ready to rock 'n roll! Check out the set times for Welcome to Rockville 2026 🤘 #musicfestivals #rockout

item.title: Insane Clown Posse Announce Tour Dates, 2026 Gathering of the Juggalos
item.description: 🤡 Whoop whoop! Insane Clown Posse hitting the road for 2026 Gathering of the Juggalos tour 🎤🎪 Let the clown craziness commence! 🤡🎶 #JuggaloGathering

item.title: Watch Robert Plant Perform Led Zeppelin’s “Ramble On” on Colbert
item.description: 🎤 Rock legend alert! Robert Plant rocks out to a classic on Colbert! Check it out now! 🎸 #RockOn #LegendaryPerformance

item.title: Jack White Extends 2026 Tour
item.description: 🎸 Jack White keeps rocking! 🤘 Don't miss the chance to catch him on tour in 2026! 🎶 #JackWhite #MusicNews

item.title: Coachella 2026 Livestream to Features All Seven Stages, 4K Resolution
item.description: Dancing into the future with Coachella 2026! 🌟🎶 Get ready for an epic livestream experience like never before! ✨ #Coachella2026 #LivestreamMadness

item.title: Weatherday announce fall North American tour
item.description: 🎶 Pack your bags, Weatherday is hitting the road! 🚌 Catch them on their North American tour this fall! 🌟 #WeatherdayTour

item.title: GoldFish Take a Big Dive into the Space Between Jazz and Dance Music
item.description: Diving deep with GoldFish into the groovy galaxy where jazz meets dance! 🎷🌌💃 #MusicMagic

item.title: Björk Will Spend the Eclipse Raving in Iceland
item.description: 🌞🌑 Björk is bringing the beats to the eclipse! Get ready to rave under the Icelandic sky! 🎶 #MusicNews #Bjork #EclipseParty

item.title: Denzel Curry Celebrates Being “First Rapper Played In Space”
item.description: 🚀 Denzel Curry's outta this world! 🌌 Who knew his bars could reach space? 🎤 #NextLevelRap

item.title: How Taylor Swift’s ‘Reputation’ Tour Helped Shape Anne Hathaway’s Performance in ‘Mother Mary’
item.description: 🎶 Taylor Swift's 'Reputation' Tour inspired Anne Hathaway's stellar turn in 'Mother Mary'! Music magic in action! ✨ #Swifties unite #MusicMeetsMovies

item.title: Tour news: Parcels, Willie Nelson, The Mars Volta, Billy Idol, The Format / The Get Up Kids, more
item.description: Ready to rock? 🎸 Check out the latest tour announcements from Parcels, Willie Nelson, The Mars Volta, and more! #livemusic #summerfun

item.title: Bob Dylan Adds New Summer US Tour Dates
item.description: 🎸 Get ready to dance the night away with Bob Dylan! 🎶 Check out his new summer tour dates now! 🌟 #BobDylan #MusicNews

item.title: Harry Styles’ Meltdown Festival Lineup Features Diverse Genres, Disco Occasionally
item.description: 🎶 Harry Styles brings the party with a mix of genres at Meltdown Festival! 🌟 Who's ready to dance? 💃 #HarryStyles #MeltdownFestival

item.title: Jack White Revealed as Surprise Coachella Performer
item.description: 🌟 Surprise! Jack White is bringing his rockin' vibes to Coachella! 🎸 Who's ready to jam out in the desert? 🔥 #Coachella2022 #JackWhite

item.title: David Schwimmer Slams Kanye West’s Apology, Urges Remaining Wireless Festival Sponsors to Exit
item.description: 🔥 Drama alert! David Schwimmer takes on Kanye West's apology at Wireless Festival. Who's ready for the next showdown? 🎶 #MusicNews

item.title: The Strokes Share New Song “Going Shopping” Via Cassette Mailed To Fans
item.description: Unwrapping new tunes like a rad '80s throwback! 🛍️🎶 Groove along with @thestrokes' latest cassette surprise! #GoingShopping #MusicNews

item.title: Rising Artists Raise the Roof at Tipify x SPIN’s “Road to Austin” Showcase
item.description: 🔥 Grooving through the night with hot newcomers at the Tipify x SPIN “Road to Austin” Showcase! 🎶 #RisingStars #MusicScene

item.title: Rocketship add East Coast dates to 2026 tour, including first NYC show in 12 years
item.description: 🚀 East Coast takeover! Rocketship returns to NYC after 12 years! Who's ready to blast off with them? 🌟 #RocketshipTour2026

item.title: Ultra Europe Is the Ultimate Summer Dance Festival
item.description: Dance the summer nights away at Ultra Europe 🌟🎶 Who's joining for the ultimate festival vibes? 💃 #UltraEurope #SummerVibes

item.title: Fans Choose Sofia D’Angelo’s ‘Time’ as This Week’s Favorite New Music
item.description: 🎶 Sofia D’Angelo’s ‘Time’ is heating up the charts! 🔥 Let’s keep those vibes going, music lovers! 💃🏻 #NewMusicFriday

item.title: Maynard James Keenan Shows Support for Ex-Classmate, General Randy George, Following Ouster
item.description: "Rockstar reunion alert 🎸 Maynard James Keenan cheers on his ex-classmate General Randy George 🤘 Friends forever! #SupportivePeers #RockLegends"

item.title: Lululemon Updates Viral Festival Bag With Some Serious Streetwear Cred: Shop the Crossbody Here
item.description: Lululemon just leveled up their festival game! 🌟 Rock that street style with their new Crossbody bag! 💃👜 #FashionForward

item.title: Guns N’ Roses Play Rare Deep Cut Live for First Time in 35 Years at São Paulo Show
item.description: 🌹🎸 Rock legends Guns N' Roses surprised fans in São Paulo with an epic throwback at their latest show! 🤘🔥 #GnR #RockNRollRevival

item.title: Watch Jack White and Jack Black Reimagine “Seven Nation Army” on SNL
item.description: 🎸 Jack White + Jack Black = SNL magic! Watch their epic "Seven Nation Army" remix now! 🔥 #MusicCollab #SNLmoment

item.title: Jack Black and Jack White Perform ‘Seven Nation Army’ Together During ‘SNL’ Monologue
item.description: 🎸 The ultimate Jack duo rocked 'Seven Nation Army’ on SNL! Check out this epic collab! 🔥 #JackBlack #JackWhite #SNLmoment

item.title: Jack White Lets It Rip on SNL: Watch
item.description: 🎸🔥 Jack White rocked the SNL stage like a legend! Hit play and feel the energy! 🤘 #JackWhite #SNL #RockNRoll

item.title: Michigan vs. Arizona: Where to Watch the March Madness Final Four Game Online
item.description: 🎶 Hoops showdown meets music showdown! Detroit rock vs. Arizona groove – catch the Final Four online! 🏀🎸 #MarchMadness #FinalFour

item.description: 🎤 Dive into the infectious energy of Lords of Acid and Princess Superstar's collab! 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #KaraokeSuperstar 🎶🔥

item.description: 🔥 Kanye West, Lauryn Hill, and Travis Scott lit up L.A.! Who else needs a concert ASAP? 🌟 #MusicMagic

item.title: YouTube’s Tuma Basa to Exit as Director of Black Music & Culture
item.description: 🎶 Sending love and good vibes to Tuma Basa as he moves on to new adventures! Thanks for all the incredible music moments! 💫 #TumaBasa #MusicNews

item.title: ‘Time’s Ticking,’ Indeed: Every Song That’s Taken More Than a Year to Reach No. 1 on Billboard’s Country Airplay Chart
item.description: 🎶 Slow and steady wins the race! Which country songs took their sweet time climbing the charts? 🤠 #CountryMusicHistory #PatiencePaysOff

item.title: Bo Lueders, Harm’s Way Guitarist and HardLore Podcast Host, Dies at 38
item.description: 🎸 Remembering the incredible Bo Lueders 🌟 His music will forever rock our hearts! #RIPBoLueders 💔

item.title: Scarlett Johansson Reveals First Concert Was Cypress Hill: “Still Buzzing”
item.description: Scarlett Johansson's first concert? 🤯 She rocked out to Cypress Hill and is still buzzing! 🎶 #musicmemories

item.title: Wolfgang Van Halen Rick Rolls Audience After Teasing a Van Halen Song: Watch
item.description: 🎸 Wolfgang Van Halen brings the ultimate surprise with a classic Van Halen hit! Rock on! 🤘🎶 #RickRolled #VanHalenRevived

item.title: U2 Share Another Surprise New EP, Easter Lily
item.description: 🎶🌟 U2 drops an unexpected EP, 'Easter Lily,' for another dose of musical magic! 🌠🔥 #U2 #NewMusic #EasterLily

item.title: Jack Black And Jack White Deliver Jack Jokes In Their SNL Promos
item.description: 🎶 Double the Jacks, double the laughs! 🃏 Don't miss the comedy duo on SNL! 📺 #JackBlack #JackWhite #SNLantics

item.title: King Princess Will Star In Aimee Mann’s Girl, Interrupted Musical
item.description: 🎶 Get ready for royalty on stage! 👑 King Princess set to shine in Aimee Mann's latest musical venture. 🌟 #MusicNews #KingPrincess #AimeeMann

item.title: Bush Bring Atmospheric Ambiance to NPR’s Tiny Desk Concert: Watch
item.description: Step into a dreamy world with Bush's enchanting Tiny Desk Concert performance! 🌌✨ Watch now on NPR's site! #Bush #TinyDeskConcert

item.title: J. Cole Joins Chinese Basketball Team, the Nanjing Monkey Kings
item.description: 🏀🎶 Ballin' beats! J. Cole takes his talent to the court with the Nanjing Monkey Kings. Slam dunk in music and sports! 🐒 #Jcole #NanjingMonkeyKings

item.title: The Temper Trap Announce ‘Sungazer,’ Their First Album in a Decade
item.description: 🌟 The Temper Trap is back with ‘Sungazer’! Get ready to groove to their first album in 10 years 🎶 #TemperTrap #Sungazer

item.title: Sincere Engineer announce new LP ‘Probably Claws,’ share “Twist My Tongue”
item.description: 🎸 Rock on! @SincereEngineer's ‘Probably Claws’ LP is coming soon! 🎶 Listen to “Twist My Tongue” now! 🔥 #NewMusicAlert

item.description: Weezer strikes again! 🎸🎶 Get ready to rock out to their catchy new single! #Weezer #NewMusicAlert

item.description: Calling all $uicideboy$ fans! 🎉 Get ready to rock with the "Grey Day Tour" in 2026! 🤘 #Suicideboys #GreyDayTour
